allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\('dicom-data-dictionary'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(d\)\); const keys = Object.keys\(d.dictionary||{}\); console.log\('count', keys.length\); console.log\(d.dictionary['00100010']\);")

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | tr -d '\r' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) npm run compile --silent ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
